text:
Record to Related Supplement Records 

DESCRIPTION: CCW Key to Link Annual Managed Care Plan (APL) Base record to corresponding Supplemental file 
records. 

SHORT NAME: CCW_APL_LINK_KEY 

LONG NAME: CCW_APL_LINK_KEY 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 15 

FILE(S): All Annual Managed Care Plan files 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: Alphanumeric character string (e.g., 123456789) 

COMMENT: The CCW_APL_LINK_KEY identifies each unique combination of submitting state entity code 
(SUBMTG_STATE_CD) and state
